diagnosis.recommended_next_step: Run a focused PWL/logit sensitivity ladder on the failing arithmetic and sequence samples, with exact top-k retained as the broad gate and exact next-token treated as a margin stress signal.
diagnosis.summary: The same exact-token misses appear across bf16 reciprocal, q8 exact normalization, and q8 reciprocal q10. Normalization precision is unlikely to be the root cause.
